{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = crocodile-creature (Cradle)
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A crocodile-creature has hardy skin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
